title: Energy Shield
description:
Transparent animated engery shield with custom sound.
sometimes flickers red, blue, green
body:
Changes the Default Shield into an energy shield.
Its animated so n this case its transparent most of the time and looks like the pictures uploaded but sometimes it flickers in red, blue, green.

Also i made custom sound for blocking. Like something hitting a force field.

requires optifine (i think) 

Hope u enjoy :)
